title: Fiat Ducato Type 290 / Hymer HM3 Caravan
remarks:
Note on the article description
The article description is for general orientation and was partly created automatically. The images provided are decisive for condition, design and technical data. Deviations from information in individual details are possible. If you have any questions, please contact us before submitting your bid.
additional_information:
Fiat Ducato Type 290 with Hymer HM3 motorhome body as a pure parts carrier. The vehicle is in great need of renovation and is not roadworthy. The mileage is about 327,281 km. The vehicle was out of service for about 10 years, stood temporarily in a hall and finally outdoors. The engine revs slightly and starts with jump start spray, but does not run regularly on diesel due to a defective return line. The brake is without function. The vehicle is rollable and can be loaded. Loading aid is available.

Equipment:
· 2.5 l naturally aspirated diesel, 55 kW
· Hymer HM3 motorhome body
· GRP high roof, undamaged
· Towbar 2 t
· Windows in order
· Roof window / skylight
· Side motorhome windows
· Driver and passenger seats
· Individual usable interior fittings
· Gas cooker / kitchen area
· 14-inch tires, outdated but dense

Notes:
· Pure parts carrier
· Very poor overall condition
· Significant rust penetration on the body and underbody areas
· Interior largely unusable
· Engine does not run regularly on diesel
· Return line defective
· Brake without function
· Front turn signals are missing
· Four previous owners
· Tires outdated
· Not roadworthy
· Only rollable and suitable for loading

Interesting parts carrier with recyclable Hymer GRP high roof, intact windows, 2 t trailer coupling and several Ducato 290/Hymer-specific components for spare parts or dismantling.

Contact:
Dennis Blos
d.blos@tbauctions.com
0173 6040 381
